extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule Posting
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Columbia Gulf Transmission, LLC (CGT) hereby notifies customers the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website has been updated. CGT reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

The current schedule has been updated to reflect maintenance activity on the following:

* Revised dates & Operational Impact – ML100 Pipeline Maintenance between 313 Valve Set and Clementsville Compressor Station – April 15 -June 10, 2026 (Previously scheduled for April 2026)
* Revised end date – Red Mountain Compressor Station Unit 2901 Maintenance – May 19, 2026 (Previously scheduled for May 19-20, 2026)
* Red Mountain Compressor Station Unit 2902 Maintenance – May 21, 2026
* Revised dates – Venice Meter Station 595 Rebuild – August 4-31, 2026 (Previously scheduled for August 10-29, 2026)

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
CGT Construction and Maintenance Schedule 04-08-2026.pdf
affectedLocations: ML100 Pipeline Maintenance between 313 Valve Set and Clementsville Compressor Station
